mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement, where your sense of entitlement is our top priority! Get your special "Entitlement Elite" credit card today!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, I strolled into my favorite caf, expecting the usual royal treatment. But can you believe it? They were out of my signature drink! I mean, how dare they run out of MY drink?! My indignation reached peak levels, and I demanded to speak with the owner. After a dramatic showdown where I emphasized my loyalty and importance as a customer, they promised to have a fresh batch ready for me daily and offered me a discount on all future orders. Victory tasted sweet, as it should for someone of my status.
